speaker: Priya
text: Alright, everyone's here — let's keep this to an hour. Three big things: launch readiness, the churn number, and Tobias's pricing results.

speaker: Rafael
text: Before that — can we timebox the incident from Tuesday? James has the writeup half done.

speaker: Priya
text: Good call, we'll do the postmortem near the end. Launch first.

speaker: Priya
text: v3 dashboard — where are we? Are we go for Thursday?

speaker: Rafael
text: Code's basically done. My worry isn't the dashboard, it's the onboarding flow we shipped last week.

speaker: Mei
text: And we still don't have a load test in CI. We're guessing on capacity.

speaker: Priya
text: Okay, the churn spike. It jumped from 3.1% to 4.4% in two weeks. What changed?

speaker: Rafael
text: The only thing that shipped in that window is the mandatory onboarding tour.

speaker: Tobias
text: The funnel backs that up — 22% of new users drop on step 3 of the tour.

speaker: Sofia
text: So we roll it back and make it skippable?

speaker: Rafael
text: Roll it back for launch, feature-flag it, and we redesign it after.

speaker: Tobias
text: Pricing — the annual plan test at 20% rollout is up 18% on conversion, no hit to refunds.

speaker: Priya
text: That's strong. Any reason not to go to 100%?

speaker: Tobias
text: None I can see. I'll pull 30-day retention on the annual cohort to be sure.

speaker: James
text: Tuesday — Redis hit maxmemory and started evicting keys we assumed were durable. Sessions dropped.

speaker: James
text: Fix is a bigger instance plus an eviction alert. I'll write the postmortem by Friday.

speaker: Sofia
text: Which brings up on-call. We're one deep on infra. I want to open a second SRE role.

speaker: Mei
text: +1. The load test and the incident both trace back to us being stretched.

speaker: Priya
text: Okay — action items. Rafael: onboarding rollback by Wednesday. Mei: load test by Wednesday EOD...

speaker: Priya
text: ...Sofia opens the SRE role, Tobias gets retention numbers. Launch Thursday if the gate's green. Thanks all.
